## Checklist

- [ ] Code is inside `tasks/task<N>/` for each task attempted
- [ ] `build/`, `install/`, `log/` are NOT committed
- [ ] Screenshots / plots / video links are included per task
- [ ] PR title follows the `NAME [ID_NUMBER]` format
